page_title: Music from Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone
text:
Music from Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone is the first soundtrack album featuring music from the film Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone, composed by Shirō Sagisu. The album was released by King Records via its label STARCHILD with the catalog number KICA-887 on 26 September 2007. http://vgmdb.net/album/19692 The executive producers are Hideaki Anno and Toshimichi Otsuki, while Shirō Sagisu produced the music (acting also as the composer and conductor) and Tomohiro Ogawa.

The album peaked at number 28 in the Oricon database, making six appearances in all. All tracks featured on the album are presented in their entirety, without being edited for film length. Most of the songs are new versions of background music from the original anime TV series Neon Genesis Evangelion. The score was recorded by the London Studio Orchestra at Abbey Road Studios in London, England.
